$schema: 26-week MAANG-prep roadmap as data. Consumed by scripts/today.ts (next-new-problem, phase/week, design picks) and future mock/stats. Items are listed in intended study order within each phase. 'done' is derived by today.ts from data/practice.json — never hard-coded here.

phases.name: Phase 1 · Foundations
phases.focus: Stack, Queue, Recursion, Linked List completion, Binary Search

phases.name: Phase 5 · Hard & Mocks
phases.focus: Hard problems, mixed timed sets, behavioral STAR stories

phases.name: Phase 6 · Review & Company Sets
phases.focus: Spaced-rep review, company-specific sets, Hard designs
